title: Tom Chang
text:
Tom Chang is a IT Specialist with expertise in cybersecurity systems. His aspiration is to build security-empowered systems for business and professional functions. He is graduating in 2026 with Master Degree in ITM and cybersecurity.

plot(iris, col="firebrick", pch=20, cex=.8)

title: About
text:
Tom loves cats and baseball. He is a cousin of Ohtani Shohei.

hist(rnorm(1000), col="lightblue", border="white", main="Random Normal Distribution", xlab="Value", ylab="Frequency")
